# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS', defaultValue: 'make build', description: 'Commands to build the project')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPTS', defaultValue: 'make test', description: 'Scripts to test the project')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_STEPS', defaultValue: 'make deploy', description: 'Steps to deploy the project')
    }
    stages {
        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                checkout scm
            }
        }
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def buildCommands = params.BUILD_COMMANDS.split('\n')
                    buildCommands.each { command ->
                        sh command
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def testScripts = params.TEST_SCRIPTS.split('\n')
                    testScripts.each { script ->
                        sh script
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def deploySteps = params.DEPLOY_STEPS.split('\n')
                    deploySteps.each { step ->
                        sh step
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
